title: Water Works (Mtwara Urban Supply Authority) (Water and Sewerage Charges) Order, 2002
title_en: Water Works (Mtwara Urban Supply Authority) (Water and Sewerage Charges) Order, 2002

provisions.content: This Order may be cited as Water Works (Mtwara Urban Supply Authority) (Water and Sewerage Charges) Order, 2002, and shall be deemed to have come into operation on 1 st day of July, 2002.

A notice is hereby given that the charges in respect of services supplied by the Mtwara Urban Water Supply and Sewerage Authority specified in the Schedule to this Order shall and be payable at the rates specified opposite the type of the services to be provided. Schedule (a) Metered rates No. Category Rate w.e.f. 1/7/2002 TShs./m 3 1. Domestic 300.00 2. Institution 900.00 3. Commercial 1,000.00 4. Industrial 1,500.00 5. Tanzania Harbours Authority (THA) 1,500.00 6. Public Kiosks 500.00 7. Irrigation (Drip/Hosepipe) 900.00 8. Water Bowsers 2,600.00 (b) Minimum charges (MC) for metered connections Domestic TShs. 2,000.00 per month Others TShs. 5,000.00 per month (c) Unmetered customers/Flat Rates (i) Domestic High Density Residential Area (HSDRA) TShs. 3,000.00 Medium Density Residential Area (MDRS) TShs. 4,000.00 Low Density Residential Area (LDRA) TShs. 5,000.00 (ii) Others Respective metered Rates for Estimated consumption in all other categories. (d) Meter Rent TShs. 250.00 (e) Connection Charges TShs. 10,000.00 for all Categories. (f) Penalties Reconnection charts TShs. 5,000.00 Water Pollution charges TShs. 100,000.00 Illegal connection charges TShs: 72,000.00 Vandalism of Water Meter TShs. 70,000.00 (g) Meter test fees 1 / 2 — 2” Diameter TShs. 3,000.00 3” — 8” Diameter TShs. 10,000.00 (h) Application form for water connection TShs. 500.00 (i) Voluntary Disconnection Service Charges TShs. 5,000.00 (j) Customer Service Charges TShs. 250.00 History of this document 14 March 2003 this version Published in Gazette of the United Republic of Tanzania 11 01 November 2002 Assented to 01 July 2002 Commenced Related documents More documents like this one [] [] [] [] ▲ To the top > Contact us Visit our Twitter/X profile Visit our Linked In profile Visit our YouTube channel About TanzLII TanzLII is operated by the Judiciary of Tanzania and the Office of the Attorney General, Chief Parliamentary Draftsman, and publishes the law of Tanzania for free online access for all.
